step_2_image_prompt: This is a precise compositing edit, NOT a regeneration. Image 1 is the locked base layer — every pixel of the woman, her face, body, pose, outfit, hair, and the entire patio scene must remain pixel-identical to Image 1. The ONLY change is adding the Alluvi Tirzepatide product packaging from Image 2 into her right hand at chest level. Her thumb presses on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers behind, ring and pinky tucked under, the box held vertically with the long side parallel to her body and the front face angled slightly toward the camera. The box should be sized realistically relative to her hand — approximately 7 inches wide, comparable to the length from her wrist to fingertips. Do not enlarge the box. Match the lighting direction, time of day, and shadow direction of Image 1 — the product is lit by the same strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, with golden rim light catching the right edge of the box and a soft shadow falling toward the lower-left. Preserve the product's natural white packaging color from Image 2 — apply only the directional lighting and shadows of Image 1, do not shift the product's base white to match the amber scene cast. The Alluvi product packaging from Image 2 must be reproduced pixel-faithfully — every text element, every color, every graphic, every gradient, every certification badge, every dimension and proportion of the box must match Image 2 exactly. Treat Image 2 as a locked product reference, not as inspiration. Maintain the exact branding, text, and graphics from Image 2 — do not hallucinate, modify, or alter the packaging label, text, or design in any way. Final reinforcement: Image 1 woman's face, body, pose, outfit, and entire patio scene must remain pixel-identical to Image 1.
